Title: Predefined field list
Description: The field picker during init offers the following predefined fields: Type, Title, Description, Status, Priority, SprintId, Reporter, Assignee, Tags, Comments, ReleaseNoteType, ReleaseNote, Due Date, Estimate, Labels, Environment, Severity, Resolution. Each comes with a sensible default type and (for enums) default allowed values that the user can customise during init. Custom user-defined fields are out of scope for now.
